result.stdout:
SnapshotTool - Static Snapshot Generator for WASM wwwroot folders

Usage:
  SnapshotTool --folder <path> [--key <apikey>] [--show] [--help]

Arguments:
  --folder   REQUIRED. The path to the published wwwroot of your WASM project.
  --key      OPTIONAL. API key for future authenticated services.
  --help     Displays this help screen.
  --show     OPTIONAL. Launch the browser in visible (non-headless) mode.

Examples:
  SnapshotTool --folder "C:\Sites\MyApp\wwwroot"
  SnapshotTool --folder "C:\Sites\MyApp\wwwroot" --key abc123xyz
